description_long: This is a compact, two-story urban house with a flat green roof, constructed primarily from reddish-brown brick. The front facade features a balcony with glass railings, potted plants, and large sliding glass doors that open into the living space. Windows are arranged in both single and double configurations, providing ample natural light to the interior. A prominent exterior staircase leads to a second-floor entry door, while the ground level includes a partially enclosed area beneath the stairs. The house's modern design is accentuated by clean lines, minimal ornamentation, and a focus on functional outdoor spaces. The overall structure is solid and geometric, suitable for dense urban neighborhoods.
description: A modern, two-story brick house with a flat green roof, balcony, large windows, and an exterior staircase. The design features clean lines and functional outdoor spaces.
description_view_0: This view shows the side of the house with a balcony, glass railings, a potted plant, and large sliding glass doors below a single window.
description_view_1: This view highlights the rear facade with two large windows on the ground floor, a single window above, and the full exterior staircase leading to the upper entry.
description_view_2: This view focuses on the side with the main entry door at the top of the staircase and a secondary door below, emphasizing the stair structure.
description_view_3: This is the front view, showing the balcony with glass railings, potted plants, large sliding doors, and a single window above, presenting the main approach to the house.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large sliding doors and single/double windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry via exterior staircase to a plain door, with a balcony and glass railings; no porch or decorative columns.
